meta.note: Pre-loaded real scan result for demo purposes.

nuclei_findings.name: SQL Injection in Login Form
nuclei_findings.description: The login form is vulnerable to SQL injection. Authentication can be bypassed entirely using OR 1=1 payload.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries. Never concatenate user input into SQL statements.

nuclei_findings.name: OS Command Injection
nuclei_findings.description: The order tracking field is vulnerable to OS command injection. Appending shell commands executes them on the server.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Never pass user input to shell commands. Implement strict input validation.

nuclei_findings.name: Credit Card Data Stored in Cleartext
nuclei_findings.description: Credit card numbers are stored and transmitted in plaintext. PCI-DSS violation.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Encrypt all PAN data at rest using AES-256. Tokenize card data.

nuclei_findings.name: Backup Files Publicly Accessible
nuclei_findings.description: Backup directory is publicly accessible containing database dumps and source code.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Remove backup files from web-accessible directories.

nuclei_findings.name: Weak Sequential Session Token
nuclei_findings.description: Session tokens are sequential integers making them trivially predictable and brute-forceable.
nuclei_findings.remediation: Use cryptographically secure random session tokens of at least 128 bits.

zap_findings.description: SQL injection confirmed in login email field. Authentication fully bypassable.
zap_findings.solution: Use prepared statements and parameterized queries.
HTML-encode all user-supplied data before rendering.

zap_findings.description: Login credentials passed as GET parameters visible in logs and browser history.
zap_findings.solution: Always use POST for login forms. Never pass credentials in URL parameters.

zap_findings.description: Session cookie transmitted without Secure flag.
zap_findings.solution: Set Secure flag on all session cookies.

top_priority_fixes: Fix SQL Injection in login form immediately
Remove OS command injection in order tracking
Encrypt all credit card data — PCI-DSS violation
Replace sequential session tokens with cryptographically secure tokens
